mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of rate-cut months.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 5.0% signals labor market deterioration that reduces corporate earnings expectations, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE crosses 5.0%, or the signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate collapsing consumer demand, which forces equity repricing and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint decline of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict negative returns with accuracy below 45%, or the interaction term shows no statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and rising corporate revenues, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: The signal predicts negative returns in >50% of post-shock recovery periods, or the 5-day forward return correlation with INDPRO growth drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid inflation outpacing the federal funds rate triggers real rate compression and Fed tightening expectations, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >55% of high-inflation months or the real rate differential shows no predictive power with Rank IC below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in total nonfarm payrolls indicate structural labor weakness that reduces aggregate consumption and corporate profits, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS declines for two consecutive months
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict negative returns with accuracy below 40%, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 across rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP exceeds 2.0% annualized, confirming robust economic expansion that supports equity valuations and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: GDP growth above 2.0% coincides with negative forward returns in >50% of cases, or the predictive correlation falls below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between contracting industrial output and rising unemployment signals a supply-side recession that erodes earnings forecasts, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO growth turns negative while UNRATE rises
failure_condition: The joint signal predicts positive returns in >55% of instances or the interaction effect is statistically insignificant in out-of-sample tests.
